# Ant Design Vue - Enterprise-class Vue UI library

- Ant Design Vue, developed by the Vue community, is a Vue UI library that aims to provide a high-quality design language and development framework for enterprise-level backend management systems. It offers a rich set of components and design guidelines, helping developers build modern, responsive, and high-performance web applications with Vue 3.

## Project Information

- Component Library: Ant Design Vue
- Version: 4.x
- Official Documentation: https://antdv.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/vueComponent/ant-design-vue
- NPM Package: ant-design-vue
- Icons Package: @ant-design/icons-vue

## Docs

### Getting Started
- [Getting Started](https://antdv.com/docs/vue/getting-started-cn)
- [Use with Vite](https://antdv.com/docs/vue/use-with-vite-cn)
- [Use with Vue CLI](https://antdv.com/docs/vue/use-with-vue-cli-cn)
- [Customize Theme](https://antdv.com/docs/vue/customize-theme-cn)
- [Internationalization](https://antdv.com/docs/vue/i18n-cn)

- [Components Overview](https://antdv.com/components/overview-cn)

## Design Specifications

- [Design Values](https://antdv.com/docs/spec/values-cn)
- [Design Patterns](https://antdv.com/docs/spec/overview-cn)
- [Layout](https://antdv.com/docs/spec/layout-cn)
- [Navigation](https://antdv.com/docs/spec/navigation-cn)
- [Data Entry](https://antdv.com/docs/spec/data-entry-cn)
- [Data Display](https://antdv.com/docs/spec/data-display-cn)
- [Feedback](https://antdv.com/docs/spec/feedback-cn)

## Usage Examples

### Basic Import
```typescript
import { createApp } from 'vue'
import Antd from 'ant-design-vue'
import 'ant-design-vue/dist/reset.css'

const app = createApp(App)
app.use(Antd)
```

### Icons Import
```typescript
import { AudioOutlined, DatabaseOutlined } from '@ant-design/icons-vue'
```

### Theme Configuration
```typescript
import type { ThemeConfig } from 'ant-design-vue/es/config-provider/context'

const themeConfig: ThemeConfig = {
  token: {
    colorPrimary: '#1890ff',
  },
}
```

## Project Current Usage

- Ant Design Vue 4.x globally registered
- @ant-design/icons-vue icons library globally registered
- ConfigProvider used for theme configuration
- Main components used: Menu, ConfigProvider, Layout, Button, Form, Table, etc.

## Notes

- This project uses Vue 3 Composition API
- TypeScript is used for type definitions
- Follows Ant Design Vue 4.x API specifications
- Compatible with Vue 3.3+
